msg: Phase 1: github audit + INDEX.md rollout 3 repos

Edward switched cloud target Fly.io -> GitHub Actions chained
Edward reframed Discord cadence: silent default, dashboard pull-only

Chat archive angle 2 (decision quotes): 62 quotes scanned 135K msgs, 6 counter-examples. KEY FINDING: Axiom 1 derivative-thinking is absent from chat (only 2 hits / 135K msgs) - lives in code not speech

Chat archive angle 3 (micro-decisions): 30 existing entries verified (10 strong, 7 partial, 12 need semantic parser). 10 NEW patterns discovered. KEY FINDING: recursive engine pattern is Edward native speech since 2018 not new adoption
Edward cancelled Fly.io migration -> use GitHub Actions chained workflow_dispatch instead
Edward reframed reporting: silent Discord, all progress -> dashboard pull-model with white-language interactive viz
